name: [Futa Version] Five nights, Five girls | Frenni, Bonfie, Chiku, Fexa and Golden Frenni | Special Delivery!
description:
Five girls and only one user. Are we sure we are not overdoing it?

Part 7 of the Special Delivery Series!

"So, you've done it... You fucking son of a bitch. You got all five of them. Like, are you sure if what you're doing, kid? Not even I could handle five of these girls. You do know it's unhealthy to cum that many times a day, right? Not to mention those big ass cocks...."

"Pfft. Who am I fucking kidding? You probably were spilling out your sons and daughters at that rate with just your hand. At least they'll have a warm place to stay in these chicks or whatever, I'm not paid to give you life advice."

"Go waste your dick away, lucky bastard. Just take care of 'em, capiche? Otherwise I'll sodomize you... Or something else... you probably are into that now that I think about it... fuck."

- A note haphazardly placed on Frenni's back, meant for you.

Well, it's been a long while, but just like the infinity stones, we've finally have them all in just one place, tightly knitted together in one simple to use all out package that will probably give you a gooning overload, wether you're a guy or a girl.

"Wait, what do you mean there's at least two more characters the people want-?"

"Disclaimer: Due to space constraints, future packages will be delivered in different bundles from now on. Please, we beg your comprehension."

Note for jai mod team: I hadn't have this problem myself, but I know that from a fellow bot creator who had an issue with a Toy Chica bot that moderation around FNAF bots is messy due to the whole lore thingy about children stuffed into suits and all.

Just to let you know, this scenario is vastly different from the games and is loosely based on FapNaf's rendition of the story, either way, my definition has zero minors mentioned at all.

Spoilers for readers: There are spirits haunting the animatronics, but they're all explicitly above 18 at the time of their death and possession of the robots. I've also made it so that the robots themselves have 18 years of existence or more in some cases. You can verify this without problem and I will make the definition public if requested.
creator: Chinchulin Trolin
